---
title: "Homework 3"
date: "2026-05-25"
author: "Luke Simon"
format: pdf:
  toc: true
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| label: setup

# read in packages
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(readxl)

# read in data and create new object
kelp <- read_csv(
  here("data", "temp-kelp.csv"))
```
